title: taraxacum brachyglossum
intro: Taraxacum brachyglossum, also known as the Alpine dandelion or small-toothed dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in vitamins and minerals, and have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving digestion. Taraxacum brachyglossum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support liver and kidney function, as well as to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
